label: Typical value (USD)
description: Typical home value (ZHVI-style index from Zillow Research CSVs you ingest). Use only Zillow’s publicly offered research downloads — not proprietary or scraped listing data.

label: Change vs year ago (YoY %)
description: Year-over-year percent change in typical home value from your Zillow Research export (latest month vs same month prior year). Public research data only.

label: Change vs prior month (MoM %)
description: Month-over-month percent change when your ingest includes consecutive month columns (see ingest script). Public research data only.

label: Home Sales
description: Homes sold (exact definition follows the Redfin Data Center file you ingest). Use only Redfin’s public Data Center files — not proprietary feeds.

label: Home Sales Growth (YoY)
description: Year-over-year change in home sales from your Redfin Data Center export. Public research data only.

label: Days on Market
description: Median days on market when present in your Redfin ingest. Public research data only.

label: Median Household Income
description: Median household income (Census ACS 5-year, ZCTA). Publicly available federal data.

label: Median Gross Rent
description: Median gross rent (Census ACS 5-year, ZCTA). Publicly available federal data.

label: Population
description: Total population (Census ACS 5-year, ZCTA). Publicly available federal data.

label: Price-to-Income Ratio
description: Typical home value divided by median household income (buyer affordability proxy).
